metadata.name: recommonmark
metadata.summary: A docutils-compatibility bridge to CommonMark, enabling you to write CommonMark inside of Docutils & Sphinx projects.

modules.name: recommonmark
documentation: Docutils CommonMark parser

functions.name: recommonmark.setup
documentation: Initialize Sphinx extension.

modules.name: recommonmark.scripts
documentation:
CLI scripts for docutils CommonMark parser

Author: Steve Genoud
Date: 2013-08-25
Description: Scripts loaded by setuptools entry points
!/usr/bin/env python
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

modules.name: recommonmark.states
documentation: Implement statemachine and state that are needed to Generate Derivatives.

classes.name: recommonmark.states.DummyStateMachine

methods.name: recommonmark.states.DummyStateMachine.reset
documentation:
Reset the state of state machine.

After reset, self and self.state can be used to
passed to docutils.parsers.rst.Directive.run

Parameters
----------
document: docutils document
    Current document of the node.
parent: parent node
    Parent node that will be used to interpret role and directives.
level: int
    Current section level.

methods.name: recommonmark.states.DummyStateMachine.run_directive
documentation:
Generate directive node given arguments.

Parameters
----------
name : str
    name of directive.
arguments : list
    list of positional arguments.
options : dict
    key value arguments.
content : content
    content of the directive

Returns
-------
node : docutil Node
    Node generated by the arguments.

methods.name: recommonmark.states.DummyStateMachine.run_role
documentation:
Generate a role node.

options : dict
    key value arguments.
content : content
    content of the directive

Returns
-------
node : docutil Node
    Node generated by the arguments.

A dummy state machine that mimicks the property of statemachine.

This state machine cannot be used for parsing, it is only used to generate
directive and roles. Usage:
- Call `reset` to reset the state
- Then call `run_directive` or `run_role` to generate the node.

modules.name: recommonmark.transform
documentation: Implement some common transforms on parsed AST.

classes.name: recommonmark.transform.AutoStructify

methods.name: recommonmark.transform.AutoStructify.parse_ref
documentation:
Analyze the ref block, and return the information needed.

Parameters
----------
ref : nodes.reference

Returns
-------
result : tuple of (str, str, str)
    The returned result is tuple of (title, uri, docpath).
    title is the display title of the ref.
    uri is the html uri of to the ref after resolve.
    docpath is the absolute document path to the document, if
    the target corresponds to an internal document, this can bex None

methods.name: recommonmark.transform.AutoStructify.auto_toc_tree
documentation:
Try to convert a list block to toctree in rst.

This function detects if the matches the condition and return
a converted toc tree node. The matching condition:
The list only contains one level, and only contains references

Parameters
----------
node: nodes.Sequential
    A list node in the doctree

Returns
-------
tocnode: docutils node
    The converted toc tree node, None if conversion is not possible.

methods.name: recommonmark.transform.AutoStructify.auto_inline_code
documentation:
Try to automatically generate nodes for inline literals.

Parameters
----------
node : nodes.literal
    Original codeblock node
Returns
-------
tocnode: docutils node
    The converted toc tree node, None if conversion is not possible.

methods.name: recommonmark.transform.AutoStructify.auto_code_block
documentation:
Try to automatically generate nodes for codeblock syntax.

Parameters
----------
node : nodes.literal_block
    Original codeblock node
Returns
-------
tocnode: docutils node
    The converted toc tree node, None if conversion is not possible.

methods.name: recommonmark.transform.AutoStructify.find_replace
documentation:
Try to find replace node for current node.

Parameters
----------
node : docutil node
    Node to find replacement for.

Returns
-------
nodes : node or list of node
    The replacement nodes of current node.
    Returns None if no replacement can be found.

methods.name: recommonmark.transform.AutoStructify.traverse
documentation:
Traverse the document tree rooted at node.

node : docutil node
    current root node to traverse

methods.name: recommonmark.transform.AutoStructify.apply
documentation: Apply the transformation by configuration.

Automatically try to transform blocks to sphinx directives.

This class is designed to handle AST generated by CommonMarkParser.

modules.name: recommonmark.parser
documentation: Docutils CommonMark parser

classes.name: recommonmark.parser.CommonMarkParser

methods.name: recommonmark.parser.CommonMarkParser.default_visit
documentation: Node type enter/exit handlers

methods.name: recommonmark.parser.CommonMarkParser.default_depart
documentation:
Default node depart handler

If there is a matching `visit_<type>` method for a container node,
then we should make sure to back up to it's parent element when the node
is exited.

methods.name: recommonmark.parser.CommonMarkParser.depart_heading
documentation:
Finish establishing section

Wrap up title node, but stick in the section node. Add the section names
based on all the text nodes added to the title.

methods.name: recommonmark.parser.CommonMarkParser.setup_sections
documentation: Section handling
Docutils parser for CommonMark
